prompt: Use the comic format of the first image. Man says: 'Save me.' Woman replies: 'Let me zoom in first'. Replace the woman’s face with the second image, wide-eyed woman, for comedic effect. Use bold comic-style text.
prompt_refined: Generate a comic panel in the distinct pop art style of image 1, featuring a blue monochromatic color scheme and halftone dot texture. The panel should depict a man on the left, looking towards a woman on the right. Above the man's head, a speech bubble should contain the bold, comic-style uppercase text: "SAVE ME." Above the woman's head, a second speech bubble should contain the bold, comic-style uppercase text: "LET ME ZOOM IN FIRST." The woman's face should be replaced with the wide-eyed, glasses-wearing, purple-haired face from image 2, seamlessly integrated into the comic art style for a comedic effect.
objects: Man on the left, looking towards the woman
Speech bubble above the man's head
Text "SAVE ME." in the man's speech bubble
Speech bubble above the woman's head
Text "LET ME ZOOM IN FIRST." in the woman's speech bubble
Woman's wide-eyed, glasses-wearing, purple-haired face (from image 2, integrated into comic style)
